description: Phase 1: Write 5 fat methodology files in core/methodology/ that become the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Each file must be complete enough to follow without any other file, self-contained for non-Kiro users, and reference references/ files for deep data tables without duplicating them.
steps: Write core/methodology/critique.md (400-600 lines) - THE critique method. Synthesize from: .kiro/sops/02-critiquing-a-song.md, .kiro/agents/critic.md, .kiro/skills/song-critique/SKILL.md, .kiro/steering/suno-formatting.md, references/CRITIQUE_REFERENCE.md. Must include: complete multi-layer critique model explanation, full 9-step analysis workflow, all 12 core category scoring rubrics with 1-10 scale meanings, 5 advanced assessments with full explanations, Suno Optimization Assessment (7-point check, section tags, compliance, alternatives), Album-context module (6 checks), Calibration and technical audit, output format specification, decision gate rules, all theoretical sources cited, quality principles.

Write core/methodology/songwriting.md (400-600 lines) - THE writing method. Synthesize from: .kiro/sops/01-writing-a-song.md, .kiro/agents/songwriter.md, .kiro/steering/songwriting.md, .kiro/steering/output-preferences.md, SONGWRITING_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md. Must include: complete 5-phase procedure (Analysis, Writing Nashville method, Quality Check, Suno Formatting, Album Integration), the 9-step workflow in full, hook principles, quality gates, output format specification, common mistakes.

Write core/methodology/suno-optimization.md (400-600 lines) - THE Suno optimization method. Synthesize from: .kiro/sops/03-optimizing-for-suno.md, .kiro/agents/suno-optimizer.md, .kiro/skills/suno-meta-tags/SKILL.md, .kiro/steering/suno-formatting.md, references/SUNO_TAGS_REFERENCE.md. Must include: complete 12-step optimization procedure, character count audit, global control tags, section tag optimization, pipe notation rules, vocal delivery tags, dynamics tags, creative sliders, era anchoring rules, the 7-dimension prompt formula, compliance checklist, parenthetical layers system, common Suno problems and fixes.

Write core/methodology/album-continuity.md (400-600 lines) - THE continuity method. Synthesize from: .kiro/sops/04-setting-up-concept-album.md, .kiro/sops/05-extending-an-album.md, .kiro/agents/album-continuity.md, .kiro/steering/concept-album.md. Must include: complete album setup procedure (5 phases: Concept, Track Registry, Rules/Constraints, Motifs/Continuity, Documentation), the extension protocol (12 steps), continuity verification workflow (8 checks), universal album rules, output formats for bibles and continuity reports.

Write core/methodology/character-voice.md (300-500 lines) - THE character voice method. Synthesize from: .kiro/sops/06-character-voice-design.md, .kiro/skills/character-voice/SKILL.md, references/CHARACTER_VOICE_REFERENCE.md. Must include: complete 11-step voice design procedure, Character Voice Template (vocal + non-vocal variants), accent reference tables, vowel/consonant character decisions, rhythmic tendency framework, mode/scale by culture, instrumentation by culture, Suno style prompt descriptors, voice evolution for albums.
acceptance_criteria: core/methodology/critique.md exists and is 400-600 lines, self-contained, includes all 12 scoring rubrics with scale meanings
core/methodology/songwriting.md exists and is 400-600 lines, self-contained, includes full Nashville method procedure
core/methodology/suno-optimization.md exists and is 400-600 lines, self-contained, includes all tag reference and optimization steps
core/methodology/album-continuity.md exists and is 400-600 lines, self-contained, includes both album setup and extension
core/methodology/character-voice.md exists and is 300-500 lines, self-contained, includes voice design template and reference tables
Each file references references/ files for deep data but does NOT duplicate full reference tables
Each file is readable by a non-Kiro user as a standalone methodology guide
verification: Run: wc -l core/methodology/*.md and verify line counts are in range
Run: grep -l 'references/' core/methodology/*.md and verify each file references the appropriate reference docs
Verify no file duplicates the full scoring rubric tables from references/CRITIQUE_REFERENCE.md (should reference, not copy)
findings: All 5 methodology files created successfully within line count targets. critique.md=492, songwriting.md=465, suno-optimization.md=451, album-continuity.md=466, character-voice.md=300. All files reference external docs in references/ without duplicating full tables. No Kiro-specific syntax (#[[file:]]) used. All files are platform-independent and self-contained.
